name: resolveCNS
title: Resolve CNS Name
description: Resolves a Convex Name Service (CNS) name to its full record, including value, controller, metadata, and child node.

value.description: Value for CNS record in CVX format, usually an address or scoped address

controller.description: Controller (trust-monitor) for this CNS record in CVX format

meta.description: Metadata field for the CNS record in CVX format

child.description: Child CNS node actor (often nil) in CVX format
